extDescription.message: Summarize the current page with Doubao, DeepSeek, Ollama, and more in one click.

popupOpenSidePanelButton.message: Summarize current page in side panel

popupErrorCannotGetPageUrl.message: Unable to get the current page URL. Switch to a regular webpage and try again.

popupErrorRestrictedPageCannotSend.message: This is a restricted page and cannot be sent. Please use this feature on a regular webpage.

popupErrorPrepareSidePanelFailed.message: Failed to prepare the side panel

popupReadyMessage.message: ✅ Ready. Close this popup, then click the extension icon again. The side panel will open automatically and summarize the current page.

popupErrorOpenSidePanelFailed.message: Failed to open the side panel

sidepanelChatHint.message: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

sidepanelPromptSummarizeFirst.message: Please click “Summarize current page” before asking questions.

sidepanelOllamaConnectShort.message: Unable to connect to the Ollama service. Please make sure Ollama is running.

sidepanelCannotGetPageInfo.message: Unable to get the current page information. Switch to a regular webpage and try again.

sidepanelRestrictedPageCannotRead.message: This is a restricted page and its content cannot be read. Please use this feature on a regular webpage.

sidepanelCannotExtractContent.message: Unable to extract page content. Make sure the current page contains readable text.

sidepanelOllamaConnectLong.message:
Unable to connect to the Ollama service. Please check:
1. Whether Ollama is running (ollama serve)
2. Whether the OLLAMA_ORIGINS=* environment variable is set before startup
   Windows: set OLLAMA_ORIGINS=* then run ollama serve
   Mac/Linux: OLLAMA_ORIGINS=* ollama serve

sidepanelAssistantSummaryRole.message: You are a professional content analysis assistant who is good at quickly summarizing the key points of webpages.

sidepanelSummaryPrompt.message:
Please summarize the following webpage in English. Requirements:
1. Start with one sentence describing the main idea
2. Then list 3-5 key points
3. Highlight any important data or conclusions

Page title: $1
Page URL: $2

Page content:
$3

sidepanelPageSummarySystemPrompt.message:
You are a professional content analysis assistant. The user is viewing a webpage and you have already summarized it. The user may now ask follow-up questions about this page. Answer based on the webpage content below. If a question goes beyond the page content, you may use your own knowledge, but clearly state which parts come from the page and which parts are your additions.

Page title: $1
Page URL: $2

Page content:
$3

sidepanelSelectionSummarySystemPrompt.message:
You are a professional content analysis assistant. The user selected a passage on a webpage and you have already summarized it. The user may now ask follow-up questions about this content. Answer based on the content below. If a question goes beyond the selected content, you may use your own knowledge, but clearly state which parts come from the selected content and which parts are your additions.

Page title: $1
Page URL: $2

Selected content:
$3

sidepanelApiKeyMissing.message: Please configure the API key for $1 on the settings page first.
